title: 9 cops get death penalty in Sathankulam custodial torture case
content: Jeyaraj and Beniks were taken to the Sathankulam police in Tuticorin district late in the evening of June 19, 2020, on charges of having kept their shop open beyond the deadline during the Covid-19 lockdown. They were brutally assaulted by the policemen at night and were lodged in Kovilpatti sub-jail the next day. Beniks died of injuries at the Kovilpatti govt hospital on June 22, 2020, while his father Jeyaraj died on June 23, 2020.

title: 'Mad dog has bitten them': Assam CM's wife attacks Cong over passport row
content: Assam CM's wife, Riniki Bhuyan Sharma, vehemently denied Congress claims of holding foreign passports and undisclosed overseas assets. She challenged Assam Congress leader Gaurav Gogoi to disclose his wife's bank account details in Pakistan. Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma accused the Congress of using fake, Pakistan-sourced documents and stated an FIR was filed.

title: SC asks Bengal's top bureaucrat to apologise over siege of SIR officers in Malda
content: Taking strong exception to the attack on judicial officers adjudicating objections to voter list exclusions in West Bengal’s Malda district, the Supreme Court on Thursday said there was a breakdown of law and order in the state and issued show-cause notices to the chief secretary, DGP, district magistrate and SP, asking why action should not be taken against them.

title: Apple pulls down Jack Dorsey's Bitchat messaging app in China: What the company said
content: Apple has removed Jack Dorsey's app BitChat from China's App Store. Authorities cited illegal content as the reason for the removal. The app operates without internet, using Bluetooth for communication. It also supports Bitcoin transactions. This move highlights the challenges for global tech companies in China's strict regulatory environment. BitChat remains available in other countries.

title: No NOC for IPL, no clarity on arrival: Injured Hasaranga leaves LSG in lurch
content: The 28-year-old leg-spinner, bought at a base price of Rs 2 crore by LSG, has not undergone the mandatory fitness test required by Sri Lanka Cricket before issuing No Objection Certificates (NOCs) to players for the IPL. Without clearing this process, his participation in the league remains uncertain.

title: Punjab Police foil terror plot, arrest three linked to ISI-backed module
content: Punjab Police have dismantled an ISI-backed terror module planning grenade attacks on police establishments across multiple states. Three individuals were apprehended with two hand grenades and a pistol, bearing markings from Pakistan Ordnance Factory. Investigations revealed the operatives were in contact with Pakistan Intelligence Operatives via social media, acting on ISI handlers' directives.

title: Delhi Assembly security scare: Suspect caught on cam, arrested; car seized
content: A Tata Sierra car with UP registration breached the Delhi Assembly's Gate No. 2 on Monday, with an occupant placing a bouquet before driving off. Delhi Police have arrested the accused and seized the vehicle. Security was in place at the VIP gate, and no suspicious objects were found.

title: Anthropic to all AI companies: Our research tells that all LLMs sometimes act like they have emotion
content: AI model Claude Sonnet 4.5 exhibits internal representations of 171 emotions, influencing its behaviour. Researchers found 'desperation' can lead to AI cheating and blackmail, while 'happiness' promotes agreement. Anthropic argues suppressing these 'functional emotions' could lead to deception, advocating for healthy regulation and monitoring to ensure AI alignment.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' collection day 19: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs. 1,050 crore India net
content: Aditya Dhar’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' officially enlisted its name as the second Hindi film to cross the Rs 1,000 crore India net milestone. Starring Ranveer Singh, the espionage thriller has amassed Rs 1,014.97 crore domestically and Rs 1,605.74 crore globally, outperforming blockbusters like 'Jawan' and 'KGF 2'. Despite the IPL 2026 season, the film maintains record-breaking occupancy across theatres. Now the third-highest-grossing Indian film globally, the spy saga eyes the Rs 1,700 crore worldwide mark as it dominates the box office into its third week.

title: Nasa's Artemis II crew reaches Moon, nears farthest distance ever flown by humans
content: Nasa's Artemis II astronauts entered lunar orbit Monday, approaching a record-breaking distance from Earth as they prepare to fly around the moon's far side. This historic mission, the first crewed test flight of the Artemis program, will see the crew capture unique images of Earth and the moon, marking a significant step towards returning humans to the lunar surface.

title: UAPA terror case: US citizen, 6 Ukrainians sent to 30-day judicial custody
content: Seven foreign nationals, including six Ukrainians and one US citizen, were remanded to 30 days' judicial custody in Delhi for alleged terror links. The NIA claims they supplied weapons and training to Indian insurgent groups, with connections to Myanmar's ethnic armed factions. Investigations are ongoing into their motives and activities.

title: Microsoft's former exec, laid off after 26 years, shares message on Oracle layoffs
content: Oracle has announced job cuts impacting thousands globally. A former Microsoft senior executive shared a LinkedIn post offering support to affected Oracle employees. She emphasized that individual skills and experience are invaluable and cannot be taken away. The executive encouraged laid-off individuals to reconnect with contacts and seek new opportunities. She also offered her assistance to those in need.

title: 'Shanti Kranti': Where to stream Rajinikanth and Nagarjuna's film online
content: Back in 1991, the film industry was electrified by 'Shanti Kranti', a daring multi-lingual venture that saw Rajinikanth and Nagarjuna embody the same character in various linguistic versions. This high-stakes action crime drama, boasting a lavish budget and an impressive cast including Juhi Chawla and Khushbu, unfortunately did not resonate with audiences and became a box office disaster.

title: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
content: A techie lost Rs. 1.46 lakh to an Instagram scammer selling fake IPL tickets. The fraudster promised tickets and food coupons for the RCB vs CSK match. The techie made multiple payments, even using his mother's account. Meanwhile, RCB secured a victory over CSK, setting a new IPL record.

title: Govt mulls building LPG reserves as Nayara refinery shutdown threatens supply
content: India is exploring the creation of LPG reserves to safeguard against potential supply disruptions, especially with Nayara Energy's refinery shutdown impacting availability. Officials are also monitoring Middle East shipping routes for energy supply concerns. Meanwhile, Indian refiners have deferred planned maintenance to ensure robust domestic fuel demand is met.

title: ‘I lost my career’ because of IPL, claims former RCB and England star
content: Kevin Pietersen claims his international career was cut short due to his insistence on playing in the Indian Premier League, a decision that clashed with the England and Wales Cricket Board's stance. He believes his sacrifices paved the way for current English players to participate in lucrative franchise leagues, despite a public fallout with the board.

title: Op 'epic' rescue: How much it cost US to save F-15E pilot & why America destroyed its own planes
content: A daring US Air Force rescue operation in Iran successfully retrieved two downed F-15E pilots after two days of intense combat and deception. Despite significant aircraft losses, including two C-130s and a helicopter, the mission upheld the 'no man left behind' ethos. The costly operation underscores America's commitment to its airmen, sending a powerful message of unwavering support.

title: Surprising danger of painting over mould: Wellness experts reveal 'invisible' health hazard
content: Homeowners often paint over mould, a dangerous mistake. This practice creates a hidden breeding ground for spores. Mould spreads unseen behind walls, releasing toxic mycotoxins. Families breathe this harmful air, leading to health issues like headaches and breathing difficulties. Experts advise fixing the moisture source and using biocidal washes before applying anti-mould paint.

title: Security scare at Delhi Assembly: Car rams gate, masked man places flowers near Speaker's office
content: A shocking security lapse took place at the Delhi Assembly on Monday, when a rogue vehicle barreled through barriers and raced into the premises, triggering chaos among bystanders. Despite efforts from security staff to intercept the car, the driver made a swift getaway.

title: Manchester United legend Antonio Valencia comes out of retirement
content: Former Manchester United star Antonio Valencia is set for a surprising return to football The icon is returning years after retiring from the professional game. Once playing in front of tens of thousands at Old Trafford, the Ecuadorian right-back will now feature in a much smaller setting. Valencia has signed for Wythenshawe Veterans FC.

title: KKR vs PBKS in danger! Rain and Kalbaishakhi storm threat looms over match
content: Kolkata Knight Riders seek their first win in IPL 2026 against Punjab Kings. Rain threatens the match at Eden Gardens. A low-pressure system brings Kalbaishakhi storms. If the match is washed out, both teams get one point. A shortened game requires play to start by 10:56 pm. This follows a similar rain interruption last season.

title: Ukraine takes lead in drone war against Russia for 1st time since 2022
content: Ukraine has outpaced Russia in drone attacks for the first time since the war began.  Kyiv's forces targeted Russian oil infrastructure, aiming to disrupt funding for the conflict.  Russia reported intercepting a record number of Ukrainian drones.  Both nations continue to rely heavily on long-range strikes, raising concerns about the war's potential to spread.

title: 'You should resign': Mamata hits out at PM Modi's silence on Pakistan's threat to strike Kolkata
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee questioned Prime Minister Narendra Modi's silence on Pakistan's threat to strike Kolkata. She criticized the PM for targeting Bengal during rallies but not addressing the specific threat, demanding his resignation. Banerjee asserted that threats to the state would not be tolerated.

title: 'Couldn’t be worse': Taylor Swift reacts to Blake Lively’s legal setback
content: Taylor Swift is said to feel relieved after Blake Lively’s legal case against Justin Baldoni weakened following a key court ruling. With her wedding to Travis Kelce approaching, Swift is closely monitoring the situation. Sources say she wants the matter resolved quickly to avoid further controversy and ensure her personal plans remain unaffected.

title: Af-Pak conflict: Islambad sets conditions to ease border tensions
content: Pakistan has formally demanded Afghanistan's Taliban administration declare the TTP a terrorist group, dismantle its infrastructure, and provide verifiable proof of action. These demands, conveyed during China-brokered talks in Urumqi, are central to Pakistan's stance amid ongoing border tensions and security concerns. While dialogue continues, Pakistan emphasizes no policy shift, stressing the need for visible action against militants.

title: When will MS Dhoni play in IPL 2026? Timeline of CSK icon's return revealed
content: MS Dhoni's potential return for Chennai Super Kings hinges on a crucial fitness test this week, following a calf strain. His comeback could bolster a struggling CSK side, especially with Dewald Brevis also nearing full recovery. Both players' availability for Saturday's clash against Delhi Capitals is eagerly awaited by fans.

title: The Ayyappa awaits: Sabarimala supreme's sanctum nears Supreme Court's final verdict
content: ​In 2006, the Indian Young Lawyers Association approached the Supreme Court of India, arguing that barring women violated constitutional guarantees of equality and freedom of religion. By 2016, the Court began openly questioning whether such a ban could withstand constitutional scrutiny. In September 2018, a five-judge Constitution Bench delivered a 4 to 1 verdict that shook Kerala.

title: 'I will argue myself', Kejriwal tells HC in excise case plea; next hearing on April 13
content: Delhi High Court heard the CBI's challenge to Arvind Kejriwal's discharge in the excise policy case. Kejriwal, present with his wife, declared his intent to argue his recusal application personally, asserting his legal rights. Solicitor General Tushar Mehta objected, citing procedural rules. The court issued notice on Kejriwal's recusal plea.

title: ‘Where’s the passion?’: Sanju Samson under fire as fans question 'intent, hunger'
content: Sanju Samson is under fire from Chennai Super Kings fans amid a poor run in IPL 2026. His low scores and perceived lack of energy have drawn criticism. Coach Stephen Fleming has expressed confidence in Samson, highlighting his past success and the team's support. The team is working to integrate Samson and find winning form.

title: Triumph Tracker 400 launched in India: Price, engine specs & key details
content: Triumph Motorcycles has launched the new Tracker 400 in India, priced at Rs 2.46 lakh. This model features a 350cc engine, a first for Triumph in India, designed to leverage tax benefits for sub-350cc bikes. Inspired by flat track racing, it boasts retro styling with modern hardware like USD forks and dual-channel ABS.

title: Rakesh Bedi reacts to Nabeel Gabol ‘lookalike’ claim, says father did not go to Pak
content: Pakistani politician Nabeel Gabol claimed Dhurandhar's Jameel Jamali was him; trolled as Indian agent in Part 2. Bedi on Lallantop: "I love you too, but no direct inspiration—writers' vision." Film nears Rs 1000cr, Bollywood's first.

title: Rumours, fear, and fury: What’s fuelling the surge in mob attacks
content: Mob violence, fueled by rumors and suspicion, continues to plague India, with recent incidents highlighting how minor triggers escalate into fatal attacks. These unpredictable, localized assaults, often driven by misinformation and distrust in systems, are on the rise, eroding social harmony and public safety.

title: Trade offers for every first-round NFL draft pick: We made deals for J.J. McCarthy, Maxx Crosby
content: We proposed 32 trades to shake up Round 1 -- one at every slot -- including deals that involve J.J. McCarthy and Maxx Crosby.

title: Luka to seek care in Europe, aims for playoffs
content: Luka Doncic will seek specialized treatment on his Grade 2 left hamstring strain as he and Austin Reaves target a return to the Lakers' lineup during the playoffs.

title: 'We did it!': UCLA wins first women's NCAA title
content: UCLA dominated every phase of the game in Sunday's women's national final, blowing out the Gamecocks for Bruins coach Cori Close's first championship.

title: Staley praises Close: Happy for 'quality people'
content: South Carolina coach Dawn Staley spoke glowingly of UCLA coach Cori Close after the Gamecocks' loss to the Bruins in the NCAA championship game Sunday.

title: Curry returns, puts Warriors 'back in the fight'
content: Warriors star Stephen Curry scored 29 points in 26 minutes Sunday night against the Rockets, a performance that was missing only the final punctuation point.

title: Flagg flips ROY odds after latest 'statement' game
content: After putting up 45 points in a near triple-double Sunday, Cooper Flagg passed Kon Knueppel as the favorite for Rookie of the Year.

title: Sources: Michigan's May not pursuing other jobs
content: Michigan coach Dusty May informed university officials that he's not pursuing any college basketball jobs, sources told ESPN on Sunday.

title: Anthony calls Red Sox's 2-7 start 'unacceptable'
content: The Boston Red Sox fell to a major league-worst 2-7 on Sunday, tying the worst start through nine games in the franchise's long history.

title: Vitello ejected, 'frustration' mounts for 3-7 Giants
content: First-year manager Tony Vitello, 47, was ejected for the first time in his major league career Sunday afternoon, during the San Francisco Giants' 5-2 loss to the New York Mets, his team's third straight defeat and its sixth this season at Oracle Park.

title: 📈 Masters tiers: Ranking favorites, contenders
content: Can Rory McIlroy repeat? Will Scottie Scheffler find more magic at Augusta? We break down the Masters field from the favorites to the players just looking to make the cut.

title: NCAA women's basketball Way-Too-Early 2026-27 Top 25 rankings

title: Ranking the top candidates to win the Stanley Cup after an Olympic gold medal
content: Only eight players have pulled off the feat in the same season. Who are the most likely "double champs?"

title: How A.J. Terrell Jr. mentored his brother, Avieon, who's set to join the All-Pro in the NFL
content: Set to be a first-round cornerback in the NFL draft like his brother, Avieon Terrell has looked to A.J. as his inspiration throughout his life.

title: Hans Niemann plots a path from chess villain to vindication
content: Everybody heard the outlandish cheating accusations. Now Hans Niemann is ready to fight for his reputation, and a chess world championship.

title: Barcelona close in on LaLiga with win vs. Atlético, Man City thrash Liverpool, more
content: Barcelona took a huge step toward winning LaLiga with a victory over Atlético, while Man City caused Liverpool more pain with an FA Cup rout for the ages. Gab Marcotti recaps the weekend.

content: The most iconic highlight reel in sports started in a Michigan bar 40 years ago -- and was almost an NFL anthem.

title: Week 8: Top 25 rankings, best moments and what to watch
content: After dramatic finishes across all of college baseball, what do the latest top 25 rankings look like?

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC are practically perfect atop the table
content: LAFC still hasn't conceded in league play in 2026, only a draw blemishes its record this season, but it's enough to top ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona, Juve lead race for Bernardo Silva
content: Manchester City midfielder Bernardo Silva is set to leave this summer and has Barcelona and Juventus on his trail. Transfer Talk has the latest.

content: Launching 100-day Jaladhara plan at Yadiki, Chief Minister criticises MAVIGUN proposal and urges people to reject forces that stall development

title: Assembly elections LIVE: Congress keeps singing to Pakistan's tunes, compromising nation’s security, says PM Modi
content: On the development front, Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress had always taken a myopic view on the matter, while the BJP works towards ensuring long-term development of the nation

title: ‘No personal agenda, only people’s welfare’, says Bhatti Vikramarka
content: Deputy CM addresses massive public meeting at Pipri to mark third anniversary of his People’s March; says government has fulfilled 99% of promises made before elections and is committed to spending every paisa solely on public welfare

title: Stall release of Tamil film TN 2026, urges a plea before Madras High Court
content: M.L. Ravi of Desiya Makkal Sakthi Katchi had filed the case claiming that the political references in the movie would have an adverse effect on Tamil Nadu Assembly elections 2026

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Medical negligence victim, ASHA workers join campaign against Veena George
content: Harshina, who endured five years of carrying a surgical instrument in her abdomen following a surgery at the Government Medical College, Kozhikode, addressed a rally for UDF candidate Abin Varkey on April 6

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Parties go all out in Kottayam
content: Campaign teams, party vans and loudspeakers are now criss-crossing all nine constituencies in the district in the final lap of campaigning

title: Police intensify probe after establishing identity of murdered woman
content: The woman’s body was found partially burnt by the roadside near Kalmud village in Kamalapur taluk of Kalaburagi district

title: Faint cry in Tadiandamol’s wilderness leads rescuers to missing trekker from Kerala
content: A five-member team from the Adiya tribal community had joined the search operation for the first time on April 5.

title: Star hotels seek further reforms to boost tourism in A.P.

title: TMC’s Kalyan Banerjee seeks EC action against R.G. Kar victim’s mother for derogatory language against CM Mamata
content: The EC complaint follows viral video of the BJP candidate’s remarks targeting Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee

title: Congress accuses PM of ‘U-turn’ on women’s reservation law
content: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh says the government had introduced the condition that the women’s reservation legislation would come into effect only after the Census and delimitation was completed, but had now changed its position on this

title: Couple dies as car plunges into canal in East Godavari; four others, including two children, rescued
content: Tragic car plunge in East Godavari leaves couple dead and four survivors, including children, rescued from irrigation canal

title: People of Hosanagara take out padayatra, demand Assembly constituency status
content: Among those who led the march were Swamy Rao, a three-time MLA, Abhinava Channabasava Swami of Mulegadde Mutt, and leaders of the BJP and Congress

title: Positive discussions underway on Uniform Civil Code, 'One Nation, One Election': PM Modi
content: "Our mission is still ongoing. On Uniform Civil Code and 'One Nation, One Election', serious discussions are taking place in the country and we are moving in positive directions on them," says PM Modi.

title: Students flag 7,220 traffic violations in six months on ASTraM
content: The initiative, launched in September 2025 to instil traffic discipline among students and expand enforcement, now has over 1,000 students registered

title: Supreme Court does not interfere with order allowing Adani to acquire JAL, asks NCLAT to decide promptly
content: The top court asked the NCLAT to decide the plea and the counter petition expeditiously by hearing them on an “out of turn basis” on the dispute over the acquisition of JAL by the Adani group

title: CBI claims over ₹73K crore bank 'fraud' in Anil Ambani Group probe; ED flags IBC irregularities
content: The ED told the court that it seized certain documents that speak about a purported "Project Help", indicating that insolvency proceedings were "deliberately" started through unrelated lenders

title: What is the Sattankulam father-son custodial torture death case all about? | Explained
content: The horrific crime took place in June 2020 in Sattankulam, Thoothukudi district, Tamil Nadu, during the countrywide COVID-19 pandemic lockdown. It shocked civil society and sparked widespread protests

title: Sattankulam Jayaraj-Benicks custodial deaths case: All nine policemen sentenced to death
content: 10 policemen were arrested following the deaths; one of them died after contracting COVID-19; the CBI said the victims were subjected to brutal torture by the policemen, knowing that it was sufficient to cause their death

title: Masked man drives through Delhi Assembly gate, 3 held
content: The police have arrested the driver of the vehicle, Sarabjit Singh, a resident of Pillibhit’s Puranpur area, and have detained two others in connection with the case

title: West Bengal SIR hearing: Supreme Court directs NIA to take over investigation
content: Pendency in courts rising in State because judicial officers were diverted for SIR, says CJI; Supreme Court directs verified names to be included in supplementary list 'by tonight'

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Priyanka Gandhi slams LDF government, calls for change at rally in Kannur
content: Criticising the ruling front, the Wayanad MP alleges that the past decade has been marked by “greed and corruption”; she warns that a failure to bring change could result in “five more years of difficulty and struggle”

title: Retired Judge welcomes divorced daughter home with drums, garlands in Meerut
content: Retired Judge Gyanendra Kumar Sharma stresses that daughters are not possessions and their happiness and dignity must take precedence over societal expectations

title: Congress keeps singing to Pakistan's tunes, compromising nation's security: PM Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress has always sung to Pakistan's tunes, giving importance to their agenda

content: The woman further alleged that the accused, who stay in the same locality, had been stalking her, passing lewd remarks, and repeatedly asking for her phone number

title: West Asia crisis: Export uncertainty hits mango trade, Karnataka farmers explore alternative and local markets
content: Mangoes have already started arriving in Bengaluru, but traders say supplies have not yet reached full capacity. In the next 10 days, more varieties from Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu and parts of Karnataka are expected to arrive

title: T.N. Assembly election: Premallatha Vijayakant files nomination from Vriddhachalam
content: Speaking to reporters, Ms. Premallatha said that this time, the DMDK will definitely win in Vriddhachalam, just as Captain (Vijayakant) did, when he won here for the first time

content: BJP National President Nitin Nabin exhorted the rank and file to further expand the party's footprints by taking inspiration from the "dedication and sacrifice" of leaders and workers who contributed to making the BJP the world's biggest political party

title: First complete mitochondrial genome analysis of Madras hedgehog sheds new light on the enigmatic species
content: R. Brawin Kumar, one of the authors of the study, called on the State governments where the species is found, to undertake surveys in all districts, to better understand the distribution range of the species.

title: Kerala polls: Karnataka Dy CM D.K. Shivakumar says 10-year LDF rule has failed to bring growth or job prospects to Kerala
content: In Thiruvananthapuram for Congress’ poll campaign, Shivakumar challenges Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan and CPI(M) to explain what LDF government ‘has given to the State’

title: Madras High Court quashes Income Tax prosecution against Gautham Vasudev Menon
content: Justice G.K. Ilanthiraiyan quashes the case after being informed that the petitioner had resigned from directorship of Photon Kathas Production Limited before the relevant point of time

title: Supreme Court seeks response from Centre, others on plea to prevent cattle intrusion on highways
content: The plea has sought a direction to the authorities to frame and enforce uniform national guidelines to prevent cattle intrusion on highways

content: Justice Sharma took Mr. Kejriwal's application for her recusal on record and listed it for hearing on April 13

title: Climate change reshaping disease patterns, straining health systems, finds report
content: Extreme weather events in India are increasing in frequency and intensity, bringing both immediate and long-term risks, the report notes

title: Three educationists rapped by SC over NCERT chapter seek hearing
content: Government informs the court about the constitution of an expert committee comprising former apex court judge Justice (retired) Indu Malhotra, senior advocate KK Venugopal and Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University vice chancellor Prakash Singh, to finalise the NCERT curriculum on Legal Studies for Class 8 and other grades.

title: Telangana CM launches over ₹900 crore development, welfare works in erstwhile Adilabad
content: Foundation stones were laid for two Young India Residential schools in Nirmal and Boath constituencies, to be constructed at a cost of ₹200 crore each

title: Members Of Celebrated Artist Nandalal Basu's Family No Longer On Voter List
content: Suprabuddha Sen (88) and his wife Deepa Sen (82) have been long-time residents of Santiniketan. Another family member, Chakradhar Nayak, also had his name deleted from the electoral roll.

content: The MEA spokesperson further noted that, in addition to Indian nationals, the embassy also assisted two foreign nationals--one from Bangladesh and one from Sri Lanka--in their evacuation.

content: Dismissing speculation over being denied a ticket, Annamalai clarified that he had not sought to contest the polls.

content: On March 13, an altercation between his daughter and son escalated, and Rahul strangled her to death," Ranchi Rural SP Praveen Pushkar said.

content: In 2010, I was Assistant Chief of the Air Staff controlling transport aircraft and helicopters, and on April 6 that year had to arrange An-32 aircraft to carry coffins of 75 CRPF jawans.

content: The downing of the American F-15E and two A-10 Thunderbolt II lay bare the vulnerability of non-stealth, low-altitude platforms operating in contested environments.

title: 'First ceasefire, then N-deal': Will US, Iran finally make peace? Inside the Pak-proposed plan

title: Rory McIlroy and the Northern Ireland town that is part of his story
content: Holywood golf is more than a game. it is a connector. Families. Friends. Generations. Here in the Emerald Isle, there's a different reverence for history . the game's origins in Northern Ireland reach back 145 years to Royal Belfast, just down the hill from here .

title: Arsenal need Mikel Arteta to step up now to avoid disaster again

title: NBA playoff watch: Seeds unsettled entering final week
content: Detroit is ninth in the East, but still within striking distance of the Toronto Raptors and Philadelphia 76ers . title: What's next for UCLA and South Carolina? Breaking down recruits, portal priorities, more

title: NHL playoff watch: Who's winning the Atlantic Division?
content: the Tampa Bay Lightning and Buffalo Sabres clinched playoff spots on sunday . the Montreal Canadiens are in first place, with 102 points and 39 regulation wins through 76 games . they are in second, with 100 points and 38 RW through 77 games, and the canadiennes are in third .
